story.iWant: to log how confident I felt before and after the session
story.soThat: the app can track my emotional progress alongside performance data
story.tasks: - Create ConfidencePromptBefore.tsx component with 5 emoji options (😟 😐 🙂 😊 🤩) - Create ConfidencePromptAfter.tsx component with same 5 emoji options - Integrate prompts into TrainingSession flow (before first drill, after last drill) - Store confidenceBefore and confidenceAfter in SessionContext - Calculate and store confidenceChange (delta) in session record - Create streakManager.ts service for streak calculation logic - Build SessionCompletionSummary component with stats display - Update session record in Dexie with confidence data - Implement streak update logic in localStorage - Add confetti animation for positive confidence change - Write comprehensive tests for confidence components - Manual verification in running dev server

criterion.given: drill session UI components are complete (Story 3.5 done)
criterion.then: the ConfidencePromptBefore component renders as modal before first drill with: - Question: "How confident do you feel about math right now?" - 5 emoji options (44px tap targets): 😟 😐 🙂 😊 🤩 - User selection required to continue - Selected confidence stored in SessionContext as confidenceBefore: 1-5

criterion.when: I complete all drills in the session
criterion.then: the ConfidencePromptAfter component renders as modal after final drill with: - Question: "How do you feel about math now?" - Same 5 emoji options (44px tap targets) - User selection required - Selected confidence stored as confidenceAfter: 1-5
Confidence delta calculated as: confidenceChange = confidenceAfter - confidenceBefore - Stored in session record - Example: Started at 2 (😐), ended at 4 (😊) → +2 improvement

Session completion summary shown after confidence prompt with: - "Session Complete! 🎉" - Stats displayed: "Drills completed: 12", "Accuracy: 85%", "Confidence boost: +2" - "View Progress" button → navigates to /progress - "Done" button → navigates to / (home)
Full session record saved to Dexie sessions table with: - id, timestamp, module: 'training', status: 'completed' - drillCount, accuracy, confidenceBefore, confidenceAfter, confidenceChange, duration

Streak updated in localStorage: - If last session date = yesterday → increment streak - If last session date = today → maintain streak (don't double-count) - If last session date > 1 day ago → reset streak to 1

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification - Training & Drill Engine
doc.snippet: ConfidencePromptBefore.tsx: Pre-session confidence capture (1-5 emoji scale) → confidenceBefore: number. ConfidencePromptAfter.tsx: Post-session confidence capture → confidenceAfter: number. streakManager.ts: Streak calculation and localStorage updates.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification - Training & Drill Engine
doc.section: Data Models and Contracts > Session Model
doc.snippet: Session interface includes confidenceBefore: number (1-5), confidenceAfter: number (1-5), confidenceChange: number (delta), status: 'completed' | 'in_progress' | 'abandoned'.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification - Training & Drill Engine
doc.section: APIs and Interfaces > Streak Manager Service
doc.snippet: updateStreak(): Compares LAST_SESSION_DATE to today. If yesterday→increment, if today→maintain, if >1 day→reset to 1. Updates LAST_SESSION_DATE. getStreak(): Reads STREAK from localStorage.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification - Training & Drill Engine
doc.section: Workflows and Sequencing > Training Session Flow
doc.snippet: Step 3: Pre-Session Confidence Prompt → User selects emoji → Store in SessionContext → Log telemetry. Step 5: Post-Session Confidence Prompt → Calculate confidenceChange. Step 6: Update streak via streakManager.updateStreak().

artifact.reason: Needs extension to store confidenceBefore, confidenceAfter, confidenceChange in training session state
Dexie database instance for persisting session records with confidence data
shadcn/ui Dialog component for modal display with closeOnOutsideClick={false}
shadcn/ui Button component for emoji option buttons (min-h-[44px] tap targets)
Main session orchestrator that needs integration points for confidence prompts

package.name: dexie
package.usage: Persisting session records with confidence data

package.name: framer-motion
package.usage: Confetti animation for positive confidence change

story-context.constraints: - Emoji buttons must be 60px size with 44px minimum tap targets (WCAG 2.1 AA) - Dialog must use closeOnOutsideClick={false} to force user selection - Dialog must be modal (blocks interaction with background) - All buttons must have clear aria-labels for accessibility - Confidence values stored as integers 1-5 (not 0-indexed) - Streak logic must handle edge cases: browser timezone changes, system date changes - Session completion summary must show after confidence prompt (not before) - Confetti animation must respect prefers-reduced-motion - All Dexie writes must be wrapped in try-catch with localStorage fallback - Streak data persists in localStorage with keys: "discalculas:streak", "discalculas:lastSessionDate"

interface.name: SessionContext Extension
Session Model (Dexie)
Streak Manager Service
interface.signature: function updateStreak(): number; // Returns new streak count function getStreak(): number; // Returns current streak from localStorage

interface.name: ConfidencePrompt Props

tests.standards: Per Epic 3 tech spec: 100% test coverage required for all components and services. Use Vitest for unit tests, React Testing Library for component tests. Mock Dexie with fake-indexeddb. Test accessibility (keyboard nav, ARIA labels, screen reader). Respect prefers-reduced-motion in tests.
tests.ideas: - AC-1: Test ConfidencePromptBefore renders with 5 emoji options, requires selection, stores value in SessionContext - AC-2: Test ConfidencePromptAfter renders after session complete, captures selection - AC-3: Test confidenceChange calculation (positive, negative, zero deltas) - AC-4: Test SessionCompletionSummary displays correct stats (drillCount, accuracy, confidence boost) - AC-5: Test session record persisted to Dexie with all confidence fields - AC-6: Test streak logic - yesterday (increment), today (maintain), >1 day (reset) - Test Dialog closeOnOutsideClick={false} prevents dismissal - Test emoji buttons meet 44px tap target minimum - Test confetti animation triggers only for positive confidenceChange - Test localStorage fallback when Dexie write fails - Test keyboard navigation through emoji options - Test screen reader announcements for confidence prompts - Integration test: Complete session → confidence prompts → streak update → Dexie persistence
